mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO info_evaluation (student_id, teaching_id, indicator_id, score, comment, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.teachingId}, #{item.indicatorId}, #{item.score}, #{item.comment}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM info_evaluation WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND teaching_id = #{teachingId}
SELECT AVG(score) FROM info_evaluation WHERE teaching_id = #{teachingId}
SELECT i.indicator_name as name, AVG(e.score) as score FROM info_evaluation e JOIN info_indicator i ON e.indicator_id = i.id WHERE e.teaching_id = #{teachingId} GROUP BY i.id, i.indicator_name
SELECT DISTINCT comment FROM info_evaluation WHERE teaching_id = #{teachingId} AND comment IS NOT NULL AND comment != ''

SELECT CASE WHEN score < 60 THEN '0-60' WHEN score >= 60 AND score < 70 THEN '60-70' WHEN score >= 70 AND score < 80 THEN '70-80' WHEN score >= 80 AND score < 90 THEN '80-90' ELSE '90-100' END as range_name, COUNT(1) as count FROM info_evaluation GROUP BY range_name ORDER BY range_name ASC
SELECT t.semester as name, AVG(e.score) as score FROM info_evaluation e JOIN info_teaching t ON e.teaching_id = t.id GROUP BY t.semester ORDER BY t.semester ASC

SELECT tc.name as name, AVG(e.score) as score FROM info_evaluation e JOIN info_teaching t ON e.teaching_id = t.id JOIN info_teacher tc ON t.teacher_id = tc.id GROUP BY tc.id, tc.name ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM info_teaching WHERE class_id = (SELECT class_id FROM info_student WHERE user_id = #{userId})
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT teaching_id) FROM info_evaluation WHERE student_id = (SELECT id FROM info_student WHERE user_id = #{userId})
